detail: Do not open intraday add unless the frontier shift is explicit rather than implied by repeated continuation.
Reduce must remain frozen_mainline with only local residue supervision allowed.
Board lockout, local-only rebound guard, and revival unlock remain upstream even when add opens later.
The first add frontier step must be supervision-only and may not claim execution authority.
Update the program master card so the frontier changes from deferred to opened in a single deliberate move.
